properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v7 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Your name is our battle cry Your name is the banner we’re lifting high Your name is our victory You fight for us, Jesus

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We boldly face our fears They’re no longer welcome here There’s power in Your name We’re standing unafraid We rise in Your endless strength

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Your name is our battle cry Your name is the banner we’re lifting high Your name is our victory You fight for us Jesus

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We walk in confidence Nothing can stand against Lord, You are on our side You’re mighty in the fight We call down Your holy fire

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Your name is our battle cry Your name is the banner we’re lifting high Your name is our victory You fight for us Jesus

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: There’s no weapon that can prosper No war that we can face That hasn’t been defeated In Jesus’ name There’s no hell that comes against us No enemy too great That hasn’t been defeated In Jesus’ name

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Your name is our battle cry Your name is the banner we’re lifting high Your name is our victory You fight for us Jesus Your name is our battle cry Your name is the banner we’re lifting high Your name is our victory You fight for us You fight for us

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: There’s no weapon that can prosper (no weapon) No war that we can face That hasn’t been defeated In Jesus’ name (Jesus' name) There’s no hell that comes against us (no enemy) No enemy too great That hasn’t been defeated In Jesus’ name

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Your name is our battle cry You fight for us Jesus
